clusters.justification: These terms consistently map onto core limbic and salience co-activation patterns, representing the broad overarching domain of emotional valence, arousal, and mood state regulation.
Rooted in striatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry, these terms collectively describe the high-level computation of subjective worth, cost-benefit tradeoff, and goal-directed motivation.

Co-activating within the default mode network, these terms reflect the macro-functional axis of generating internal, abstract representations regarding oneself, interpersonal relationships, and agency.
